name: Guardian Capital
message: Guardian Capital is a privately held real estate development firm. For more than five decades, we have designed and developed residential communities with expansive amenities that provide residents with an exceptional lifestyle experience. We create tastefully curated residential communities with a focus on institutionally-sized, ground-up multifamily development projects in underserved markets.   1,800 UNITS OWNED AND OPERATED 500,000 SQ FT OF RETAIL Property UNDER MANAGMENT 2,500 RESIDENTIAL UNITS IN DEVELOPMENT 40,000 TOTAL HOMES BUILT SINCE INCEPTION 50 PROJECTS ACROSS 8 STATES
